title: ⚡ Launch Faster with Version 7.6.0!
message: Control your app startup experience with our new customization features. We've added toggles for faster loading and optimized your security loops!
points: 🚀 Launch Animation Toggle: Go to your Profile Settings to instantly turn the launch video on or off for a faster, snappier startup.
📱 Enhanced Layout Transitions: Optimized card grids and staggered entrance layout views to eliminate screen overflow clipping.
⚙️ Migration Polish: Stabilized background serialization mechanics to guarantee a safe update path for our existing user base.

title: 🎭 Trick Snoops with the New Update!
message: We just added our coolest privacy feature yet: The Corrupt File Illusion. Protect your files even when someone is watching you!
points: 💥 Corrupt File Illusion: Tap a file to instantly display a fake 'File Corrupted' error to nosy friends.
👆 Secret Gestures: Bypass the fake error and open your files securely using a Double Tap, Long Press, or Swipe.
✨ UI Polish: Enjoy smoother, faster, and more beautiful animations across your secure vault.
🐛 Bug Fixes: We squashed some minor bugs to keep your data safer than ever.

title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest SafeKeep features and security patches.
points: 🔔 In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly when you open your vault.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update.
⚡ Faster Launches: We removed startup interruptions so you get to your secure files faster.
🔒 Security Boost: Under-the-hood encryption tweaks for an even faster, zero-lag experience.
